scenarios.description: Calling attr on an element whose attributes field is already non-null (no new initialization) returns this and updates value
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.attributes(); // force attributes initialization
scenarios.expectedResult: returns same instance and updates attribute value correctly
pseudocode: TEST TC07 attr on existing attributes

scenarios.description: Chaining multiple attr calls with different keys preserves previously set entries and returns this
scenarios.expectedResult: both attributes present with correct values
